documents.title: EHBO First-Aid Posts — King's Day Amsterdam (Official)
documents.content:
Official EHBO (first-aid) posts on King's Day Amsterdam. For non-life-threatening issues, go to the nearest post instead of calling 112. All posts are open 11:30–23:30 unless otherwise stated.

- EHBO-post Centraal Station — Burgwallen-Nieuwezijds, Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Dam — Dam, Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Koningsplein — Koningsplein , Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Leidseplein — Leidseplein, Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Noordermarkt — Noordermarkt, Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Rembrandtplein — Rembrandtplein, Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Vondelpark — Vondelpark, Amsterdam
- EHBO-post Westermarkt — Westermarkt, Amsterdam
